assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 13-14 show: 'git checkout TC-9005' and 'git pull' under the heading '### 1. Checkout Target Branch'. Line 10 explicitly states: 'The task specifies **Target Branch: TC-9005**. This is a feature branch, not main.' The plan checks out TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 34 shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Line 37 reiterates: 'The PR targets `--base TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `--base main`.' Lines 99-100 repeat the PR creation command with '--base TC-9005'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 23 shows: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 26 explicitly states: 'The branch is created from TC-9005 (the target/feature branch), NOT from main. The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task ID), NOT TC-9005 (the feature branch).' Line 33 shows 'git push -u origin TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 45-49 under '### Step 4 -- Understand the Code' explicitly list inspecting all three files: (1) 'Inspect `migration/src/lib.rs`' (line 45), (2) 'Inspect `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs`' (line 47), and (3) 'Verify `entity/src/advisory.rs`' (line 49). These inspections are listed under 'Pre-Implementation Analysis' which comes before the 'Files to Modify' and 'Files to Create' sections.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 94 states: 'With the trailer: `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 82-92 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' which follows the Conventional Commits format type(scope): description. The footer on line 91 contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 10 states: 'The task specifies **Target Branch: TC-9005**. This is a feature branch, not main.' This is referenced in the heading '### 1. Checkout Target Branch' (line 9) and further reinforced on line 26: 'The branch is created from TC-9005 (the target/feature branch), NOT from main.' and line 37: 'The PR targets `--base TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `--base main`.' The plan clearly extracted and acted on the Target Branch information.
